title: AmmoCode non-destructive doctrine
motto: Never destructively modify itself or the outside world — read, edit in memory, export on purpose
rules: No write_file / save_file / delete API — disk writes forbidden from server
Save = browser Export download only — operator chooses destination
Read path jail: home, SG, AmmoOS, /tmp
AmmoCode install tree is read-only for API — cannot overwrite server, data, or lib
g16_run blocked on AmmoCode tree and system paths — compile/run user projects only
Defield markers only touch AmmoCode state dir — never foreign trees
Blocked API actions: write_file, save_file, delete_file, exec_shell, eval
